rows.need: ground evaluation criteria before judging success or failure
rows.title: Evaluation Criteria Lens

rows.need: bind recommendations to their rationale and avoid unsupported action proposals
rows.title: Recommendation / Rationale Lens

rows.need: keep results attached to the context or condition in which they hold
rows.title: Context / Condition / Result Lens

rows.need: detect implicit questions before rendering an answer or action
rows.title: Implied Question Lens

rows.need: bind corrections to prior claims and update current-state interpretation
rows.title: Prior / Current Correction Lens

rows.need: mark irrelevant context so it does not pollute the active Flow state
rows.title: Irrelevant Context Filter Lens

rows.need: ground QC failures as blockers rather than ordinary notes
rows.title: Quality Control Failure Lens

rows.need: ground which constraints dominate when actions conflict
rows.title: Constraint Priority Lens

rows.need: route unresolved evidence gaps toward ask/search/hold instead of confident answer
rows.title: Evidence Gap Ask Guard

rows.need: ground default rules separately from explicit overrides
rows.title: Default / Override Rule Lens

rows.need: bind stated problems to proposed solutions without treating every nearby action as a fix
rows.title: Problem / Solution Pair Lens

rows.need: keep local definitions local instead of promoting them globally
rows.title: Definition Scope Guard

rows.need: bind a claim to its evidence span or citation before answer commit
rows.title: Evidence Span / Citation Lens

rows.need: detect explicit contradiction markers and route them toward defer or conflict resolution
rows.title: Contradictory Marker Lens

rows.need: bind exceptions to the requirement they constrain
rows.title: Requirement / Exception Pair Lens

rows.need: separate probability estimates from observed outcomes
rows.title: Outcome / Probability Distinction Lens
